name: Lemony Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon finely grated fresh lemon zest
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the beans and place them in a large saucepan of boiling salted water. Cook until crisp-tender, 3 to 5 minutes.
2. Drain the beans well in a colander.
3. In a bowl, toss the beans with zest, oil, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
